subject: (no subject)
body:
Darling JE!
The introduction in the NY Mag article depicts you just as I know you:
ENERGETIC, SPARKLING and CHARMING! Nothing in your hands and dressed in
jeans.

"Did Icarus like massages?" Hahahahahha! :)

You're the most brilliant man, 2nd to none.
Always,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
